name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What layer does this affect?

- [ ] Universe definition (what objects/actions exist)
- [ ] Virtualization boundary (input sanitization, taint classification)
- [ ] Intent processing (physics law evaluation)
- [ ] Agent interface (how agents propose intents)
- [ ] Integration (how hypervisors compose with existing frameworks)
- [ ] Documentation

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? What scenario is currently impossible or awkward?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've considered.

## Additional context

Links to related work, papers, or implementations that inform this request.
